author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Tomorrow is finally the day we've all been waiting for. We are officially less than 24 hours away from 426LIVE:NYK!

Join us at 12:30 EST / 4:30 PM UTC on https://www.twitch.tv/StarAtlasGame and If you'd like a chance to win a merch pack, register for free here: https://www.eventbrite.com/e/426live-nyk-star-atlas-product-launch-keynote-free-entry-tickets-421098606267

Below, you'll find the official event schedule. We absolutely cannot wait to see you all tomorrow!
